creator: bzeeb-lists@lists.zabbadoz.net
text:
-W has been in the man page for a long time.  The arguments on each
section are usually sorted alphabetically there.

If you want to see your vlan<n> names in the default view, renaming the
interfaces to v<n> - or whatever pleases you - should do the trick.

I think this is not a bug.
If you feel the man page should look "more modern" with a synopsis feel
free to submit a patch for that as a follow-up.
